text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh! Look at the time. I must set off for training.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You speak to me, beautiful flower petals? Yes, I hear it clearly.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Look upon me, o gorgeous Overlord. "I wish to
adorn you, o wondrous Overlord."

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas... Forgive me, pretty flowers, for enticing
you with my corruptible charm!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Accept this compensation. I will offer you my
time, through which we may speak together!

text_block_list.name: Flower Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello! Which flowers are you looking for
today?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Every single blossom in this establishment,
naturally!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, T.M. Opera O skips her training session
to speak with all the flowers in the shop.
